introSection: TNT Tren de la Mina is a steel roller coaster located at Parque de Atracciones de Madrid in Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain. It was built by Gerstlauer and opened on 30 March 2012.
fullText: TNT Tren de la Mina is a steel roller coaster located at Parque de Atracciones de Madrid in Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain. It was built by Gerstlauer and opened on 30 March 2012.
